title: MCPings
description: Adds a location pinging system to the game
body:
# MCPings
**Adds a location pinging system to Minecraft.**

![pinging](https://i.imgur.com/KiHRWhS.gif)

## Features
- Only show pings from players within a certain distance (configurable on the client)
- Different Ping Types based on who or what was pinged
- Shows distance from ping as well as the username of pinger
- Shows pings that are off screen
- Config options for different ping type's colors
- [Compatibility plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mcpingsplugin) for spigot based servers with support for showing pings to unmodded players

## Config
Can be opened through ModMenu or with `/mcpings config`


____
Based on [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) by LukenSkyne
